movement_reachable_tile: {terrain_rules} With {movement_points} movement points, which lettered tile can the blue unit reach?
Using {movement_points} movement points, choose the lettered tile the blue unit can reach. {terrain_rules}
The blue unit starts on its current tile. It has {movement_points} movement points. {terrain_rules} Which lettered tile is reachable?
{terrain_rules} Which candidate letter marks a tile reachable by the blue unit with {movement_points} movement points?
The blue unit may spend up to {movement_points} movement points. {terrain_rules} Select the reachable lettered tile.
movement_sequence_endpoint: The blue unit follows this move sequence: {move_sequence}. Which lettered tile does it end on?
Starting from the blue unit, follow these moves in order: {move_sequence}. Choose the lettered ending tile.
Apply the moves {move_sequence} from the blue unit's current tile. Which lettered tile is the final position?
Move the blue unit one tile per step using this sequence: {move_sequence}. Which letter marks the endpoint?
Follow this ordered move list from the blue unit: {move_sequence}. Select the final lettered tile.
movement_reachable_tile_count: {terrain_rules} Using at most {movement_points} movement points, how many tiles can the blue unit reach? Do not count the tile the unit starts on.
The blue unit starts on its current tile. {terrain_rules} How many other tiles can it reach using at most {movement_points} movement points?
With up to {movement_points} movement points, count the tiles the blue unit can reach, excluding its starting tile. {terrain_rules}
{terrain_rules} How many non-starting tiles are reachable by the blue unit within {movement_points} movement points?
The blue unit may spend up to {movement_points} movement points. {terrain_rules} Count every reachable tile except the starting tile.
terrain_type_tile_count: How many visible {terrain_label} tiles are in the map?
Count the {terrain_label} terrain tiles in the tactical map.
What is the number of visible {terrain_label} tiles?
How many grid cells are {terrain_label} terrain?
Count every visible tile whose terrain type is {terrain_label}.
movement_cost_value: {terrain_rules} What is the fewest number of movement points the blue unit needs to reach the marked target tile?
Using the terrain costs, find the minimum movement-point cost for the blue unit to reach the marked target tile. {terrain_rules}
The blue unit starts on its current tile. {terrain_rules} How many movement points are needed to reach the marked destination tile using the cheapest path?
{terrain_rules} Count the minimum total movement cost from the blue unit to the marked target tile.
The blue unit may move only up, down, left, or right. {terrain_rules} What is the shortest movement cost to the marked target tile?
counterfactual_terrain_conversion_cost_v: {terrain_rules} {conversion_rule} What is the fewest number of movement points the blue unit needs to reach the marked target tile?
Using the terrain costs, choose the best single terrain-to-road conversion before moving. {terrain_rules} {conversion_rule} What is the minimum movement-point cost to reach the marked target tile?
The blue unit starts on its current tile. {terrain_rules} {conversion_rule} After that conversion, how many movement points are needed to reach the marked destination tile using the cheapest path?
{terrain_rules} {conversion_rule} Count the minimum total movement cost from the blue unit to the marked target tile after the best conversion.
The blue unit may move only up, down, left, or right. {terrain_rules} {conversion_rule} What is the shortest movement cost to the marked target tile?
water_barrier_unreachable_tile: {water_rule} Which lettered tile cannot be reached from the blue unit?
The blue unit starts on its current tile. {water_rule} Select the lettered tile that is unreachable.
{water_rule} Which candidate letter marks a tile on a part of the map the blue unit cannot reach?
Using only the water-blocking rule, choose the lettered tile that cannot be reached from the blue unit. {water_rule}
From the blue unit's current tile, determine which lettered tile is cut off by water. {water_rule}
